notes: First-contact model + context visibility for mistral-vibe. The adapter reads the sibling meta.json sidecar: config.active_model -> ModelName (mistral-medium-3.5, confirmed from 6 live sidecars) and stats.context_tokens -> Tokens on turn_done. Model name displays and token count is non-zero. KNOWN_FAILING: the context-window BAR does not render — mistral-medium-3.5 is absent from core/pkg/capacity (only the CO2 tier exists), so ComputeContextUtilization returns window=0/util=0/unknown=true (tailer_metrics.go L527-528). The spec asserts the CORRECT (full) behavior: context_window_nonzero + context_utilization_nonzero WILL fail until mistral is added to the capacity map. Cost is not asserted — the adapter does not emit cost. Driver: wait_turn is a stubbed SEAM; record ports it (driver-gap) before recording.

text: Turn completes back to ready. ModelName=mistral-medium-3.5 (!= unknown) and token count > 0. context_window / context_utilization SHOULD be > 0 but are 0 today (mistral absent from the capacity map) — known_failing.
